label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 7

extraction.one_line_summary: HARADA Jesus won from a 6-rider break that survived despite Trek's aggression on the central climb, holding 1-minute gap to sprinters on descending finish
tactical_patterns: Trek Segafredo hammered central climb to drop sprinters but Bennett's team paced him back, forcing Trek to abandon plan.
Break survived despite 50km tailwind descent because Trek stopped work after failing to shed Bennett on climb.
BikeExchange and Arkéa chased for Groves/McClay but gave up with 10km remaining when gap stayed above minute.

rider_signals.HARADA Jesus: positive: timed sprint perfectly after surviving Trek's tempo on climb, second Spanish Vuelta victory
rider_signals.WRIGHT Fred: positive: third place in break sprint after also being in previous stage break, excellent Vuelta form
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: survived Trek's climb ambush via team pacing, extended green jersey lead despite unfavorable parcours
rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: negative: dropped on central climb when Trek accelerated, confirming limited climbing range versus other sprinters
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: negative: Trek's climb strategy to drop Bennett failed, wasted team energy for only 15-point green jersey gain
